steps.title: Notice the agreement
steps.content: Anton's evidence suggests glass was not exclusive to royalty. Keller states that glass was not a closely controlled royal commodity and is described as concurring, so the transition must show that his view parallels hers.

steps.title: Reject cause and contrast
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D both signal a result, but Keller's statement is parallel support rather than a consequence of Anton's discovery. Choice C signals contrast, yet Keller agrees with Anton. The answer is B.
